'''鈭歡-z-d-t''' ('''kagazdetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tyne|tyne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tyne|tyne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-z-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| kagazdetoko
|}
